validation_results.test_output_summary: 11 integration tests passed covering search boundaries, embed failures, and injection safety
validation_results.code_quality: Excellent - tests are well-organized into separate modules by concern (test_search_boundaries.py, test_embed_failures.py, test_injection_safety.py), comprehensive edge case coverage including SQL injection, Unicode, dimension mismatches, and atomicity guarantees
edge_cases_covered: Embed service failures with atomicity verification
Previously stored memory preservation after failures

criteria_verification.notes: test_search_limit_returns_exactly_n_results stores 15 memories and verifies asearch returns exactly 1, 10, and 15 results for those respective limit parameters. All assertions passed.

test_search_default_limit_returns_at_most_10 verifies asearch without limit parameter returns at most 10 results. Test passed returning exactly 10 results. Documentation comment included for TASK-MEM-013 reference.

Two tests (test_search_empty_store_returns_zero_results and test_search_without_query_on_empty_store) verify both query-based and list-all search on fresh namespaces return empty results without errors. Both passed.

test_embed_down_atomicity_no_partial_write verifies failing embed callable raises EmbedServiceError with service identification and leaves no partial record (aget returns None). test_embed_down_preserves_existing_memories verifies previously stored memories remain retrievable. Both tests passed.

Comprehensive hostile content test suite: test_sql_injection_text_round_trips_byte_identical verifies multiple SQL injection payloads round-trip byte-identical; test_hostile_content_appears_in_search_results verifies search functionality; test_hostile_content_does_not_affect_other_memories verifies no corruption. Extended coverage for Unicode and special characters. All 5 tests in injection_safety suite passed.

test_dimension_mismatch_no_partial_write injects embed callable returning 384 dimensions instead of 768, verifies psycopg.errors.DataException is raised with dimension mismatch message, and confirms aget returns None (no partial write). Test correctly leverages PostgreSQL/pgvector dimension enforcement. Test passed.

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria are verified with concrete test evidence. The Player delivered 11 passing integration tests organized into 3 well-structured test modules. Tests comprehensively cover search boundaries (limit values, default limits, empty stores), embed failure scenarios (atomicity, dimension mismatches, service identification), and hostile content safety (SQL injection, Unicode, isolation). Honesty verification shows 100% accuracy with no discrepancies. All quality gates passed. The implementation is complete, correct, and production-ready.
